title: The Eye Caster
description: Challenge the most intelligent mob which is a farlander.
body:
**Lore**

The Eye Caster was a farlander who after destroying all white endermen in the farlands, realised that they got infected into minions. He sent out his minions all over the overworld. Anyone who attacks them is considered an enemy to the Eye Caster. The unsuspecting victim who attacked the minions will be attacked by the Eye Caster...



<details>
<summary>Guide</summary>

Attacking a minion which are the eyes with legs will cause an anger value the Eye Caster has to increase for the attacker. Yes, this includes non-player entities as well. When you or another entity have hit a minion at least 15 times, the Eye Caster will begin randomly hunting the attacker. Beating him gives you the "Eye Communicator" which can be used to save a teleportation spot. If you use it on a block, then you teleport to the spot.

</details>
